_meta.credit: Structure adapted from borski/travel-hacking-toolkit (MIT) — github.com/borski/travel-hacking-toolkit. Data independently re-verified for 2026.
_meta.notes: All redemption costs are saver/standard award levels in 2026. Always cross-check on the program's own site before transferring points. Status of devalued entries kept intentionally so the planner can flag them.

entries.title: ANA First Class via Virgin Atlantic Flying Club
entries.constraints: Phone-only booking. Saver F only. ~8 F seats per 777-300ER. HNL-NRT 57,500 ow; LAX/SFO 72,500 ow; East Coast 85,000 ow.
entries.notes: Up to 41% increase from prior chart in late 2025. Still the cheapest path to ANA First per mile.

entries.title: ANA First Class via Air Canada Aeroplan
entries.constraints: Flat 110K one-way regardless of US gateway. Aeroplan does NOT pass partner fuel surcharges. ANA releases F to Aeroplan more reliably than to most partners in 2026.
entries.notes: Best balance of cost, taxes, and availability for ANA First in 2026.

entries.title: Lufthansa First Class via Aeroplan
entries.constraints: JFK/EWR price at 90K ow; rest of NA 100K ow. LH releases First only ~14 days out to non-Senator partners. Aeroplan eats no LH fuel surcharges.
entries.notes: Cheapest mileage rate AND lowest cash co-pay for LH First among major programs.

entries.title: Lufthansa First Class via United MileagePlus
entries.constraints: Saver F released only ~14 days before departure. United now fully dynamic but this stays roughly fixed in 2026.
entries.notes: Expensive vs Aeroplan but useful if you only hold Chase UR or United miles.

entries.title: Lufthansa First Class via Avianca LifeMiles
entries.constraints: 120K ow standard; LifeMiles+ subscribers get 10% off (108K ow). No surcharges. ~14-day F release window.
entries.notes: Survived the May 2026 cuts but premium-cabin partner prices were hit hard elsewhere. Verify rate at search time.

entries.title: Qatar Qsuites via Qatar Privilege Club Avios
entries.constraints: Off-peak Saver from 70,000 Avios; peak Saver ~94,500. Best Qsuite availability is via Qatar's own program in 2026 — partners get crumbs.
entries.notes: Now the dominant way to book Qsuites; partner allocations have been progressively starved.

entries.title: Qatar Qsuites via American AAdvantage
entries.constraints: 70K ow standard. Qatar has been cutting AA partner allocation in 2026 — availability spotty.
entries.notes: Still good when available, but switch to Avios or Atmos if not.

entries.title: Qatar Qsuites via Alaska Atmos Rewards
entries.constraints: 70K ow. One free stopover on each one-way partner award. Single-partner-per-ticket rule still in force after Mileage Plan -> Atmos rebrand Aug 2025.
entries.notes: Atmos preserved the old MP partner award chart. Stopover on partner OW is uniquely generous.

entries.title: Iberia Business Class East Coast US <-> Madrid (off-peak)
entries.program: Iberia Plus / British Airways Club Avios
entries.constraints: Off-peak windows only (roughly Jan, Feb, late-Nov, early-Dec). YQ surcharges ~$250 ow. From other gateways now 40,500 ow after Sep 2025 chart bump.
entries.notes: Sweet-spot 34K ow still survives ex-BOS/JFK/IAD/ORD; everywhere else now 40.5K. Move Avios into Iberia, not BA.

entries.title: Singapore Airlines Suites (A380) via KrisFlyer
entries.route_pattern: US <-> Singapore (via FRA/NRT) and SIN <-> SYD/HKG/PVG
entries.constraints: Saver: JFK-FRA-SIN 132K ow Suites. Saver Suites only released to KrisFlyer members — no partner can book. Short-haul SIN-PVG Suites from 58,500 ow on new A380 routes May 2026.
entries.notes: A380 Suites returning to Shanghai and HKG in 2026 — short-haul Suites is the new sweet spot.

entries.title: Cathay First Class via Cathay Asia Miles
entries.constraints: Standard Award 125K ow; Choice Award ~187.5K ow when Standard sold out. Cathay First only on JFK/LAX/SFO/BOS/ORD.
entries.notes: Direct member redemption gets more F space than partners.

entries.title: Cathay First Class via Alaska Atmos Rewards
entries.route_pattern: US <-> Hong Kong (+ free stopover, e.g. HKG -> SIN)
entries.constraints: 70K ow with one free stopover on a one-way partner award. Phone booking only for partner stopovers. Atmos kept old MP chart intact post-rebrand.
entries.notes: Still the single best F redemption on a US-based program. Allow 30+ min on phone.

entries.title: Japan Airlines First Class via American AAdvantage
entries.constraints: Flat 80K ow Saver. AA still publishes the partner chart; JAL releases F ~360 days out, more close-in.
entries.notes: Best mileage rate for JAL F outside JAL's own program.

entries.title: Japan Airlines Business Class via Finnair Avios / BA Avios
entries.constraints: BA Avios now fully dynamic for JAL — use Finnair Avios (still chart-based) instead. Finnair Plus F at 125K ow.
entries.notes: Avios are pooled across BA/Iberia/Aer Lingus/Finnair — move them to whichever still has a chart.

entries.title: EVA Air Business Class via Avianca LifeMiles
entries.constraints: Post-May-2026 devaluation, 85K-90K ow standard. EVA gives EVA-J Royal Laurel — one of the best biz products.
entries.notes: Previously 75K ow; raised across the board in the May 2026 stealth devaluation.

entries.title: Turkish Airlines Business Class via Aeroplan
entries.constraints: East Coast/Midwest in 4001-6000mi band = 70K ow until June 1, 2026, then 75K ow. West Coast 90K ow. Aeroplan = no fuel surcharges on TK.
entries.notes: Note the planned bump in June 2026 — book before then if East Coast.

entries.title: Korean Air First Class via SKYPASS
entries.constraints: 80K ow US-ICN. F release resumed in 2026 on JFK-ICN and LAX-ICN. Family-pool only for transfers — direct earn or Marriott transfers only.
entries.notes: Earn via Chase Sapphire (KE removed from Bilt). Best paired with Marriott 60K -> 25K-mile bonus transfers.

entries.title: Flying Blue Promo Rewards (rotating 25% off)
entries.route_pattern: Rotating monthly — historically US <-> Europe + Caribbean
entries.constraints: 25% off Saver awards on selected routes each month, book by month-end. May 2026 = SXM only for biz (63,750 ow). Heavy YQ surcharges on AF metal — KLM lighter.
entries.notes: Always check the monthly Promo list before transferring. Best deals usually shoulder-season.

entries.title: Aeroplan Stopover (one stop for 5,000 points)
entries.constraints: 5K points per stopover. 1 stopover on a OW; 2 on a RT (one each direction). Must be > 24h, < 45 days, not within US/Canada.
entries.notes: Add-on rule, not a fare on its own. Combine with Lufthansa F or ANA F for two-destination trip at near-zero marginal mileage.

entries.title: AAdvantage Web Specials (unpublished reduced awards)
entries.constraints: Web Specials appear and disappear at AA's discretion. Often 30-50% off standard rates. EU biz from 40-50K ow vs 57.5K standard. Cannot hold a Web Special — must purchase instantly.
entries.notes: Search aa.com directly with flexible-date view; Web Specials are tagged in results. AAdvantage hold reduced to 24h in 2025 and not available on Web Specials.

entries.title: Etihad First Class Apartments (A380) via Etihad Guest
entries.constraints: Direct member redemptions ~200-220K ow. Amex MR transfers end 30 Jun 2026 — last big transferable-points window. Bilt/Citi/Capital One still transfer post-cutoff.
entries.notes: Move Amex MR to EY before 30 Jun 2026 if you want this product. Apartments only on JFK/ORD/LHR A380s.

entries.title: Air France La Première via Flying Blue
entries.constraints: Platinum or Ultimate Flying Blue status required to even redeem. 1 award seat per flight max. Heavy YQ. CDG-IAD ~160,500 ow.
entries.notes: Status gate makes this aspirational unless you fly AF enough or status-match in. Product is the gold standard of long-haul F.

entries.title: Emirates First Class via Emirates Skywards
entries.constraints: Silver/Gold/Platinum status required for member F awards (lifted via partner book or paid upgrade). Skywards Saver F JFK-DXB ~155K ow + ~$950 YQ (post-May 2026 ~15% bump). 1A The Residence still ~600K+ where offered.
entries.notes: Skywards bumped award rates ~15% in May 2026. JAL Mileage Bank can NOT book EK First (since 2021) — Skywards-only.

entries.title: Avianca LifeMiles US <-> Europe Business
entries.constraints: Post-May-2026 devaluation: JFK-FRA on LH now 92,400 ow. West Coast often 69K ow. LifeMiles+ 10% discount survives. No fuel surcharges on Star partners.
entries.notes: Aeroplan now better than LifeMiles for most East Coast Europe biz redemptions in 2026. Was 63K ow before 2026; lost ~50% of its value in 15 months.

entries.title: American AAdvantage Off-Peak Economy to South America Region 1
entries.route_pattern: US <-> Colombia, Peru, Ecuador, Bolivia, Manaus (BR), Suriname
entries.constraints: Off-peak Jan 16-Jun 14 and Sep 7-Nov 14. Economy only — biz is full price. Region 1 only; Argentina/Chile/most-of-Brazil/Uruguay/Paraguay are Region 2 (no off-peak).
entries.notes: Surviving off-peak chart-based redemption from AA in 2026 — almost everything else moved dynamic.
